response: "The pen is mightier than blade; The pen is mightier than steel. To make this choice, we must not delay our analysis of the border cases where n equals its own last four digits raised to the ninth power. These sets serve to illustrate that for odd natural numbers n < 10000, the count where the last four digits of n^9 are greater than n is equal to the count where they are less than n, as the mapping is a permutation with fixed points."
